core_mechanism: contrastive self-supervised representation learning: learning an embedding by pulling together representations of related (positive) instance pairs and pushing apart unrelated (negative) ones, used as the pretraining objective in place of masked-input reconstruction
brief_reason: The abstract's method is a contrastive-pretrained model whose central claim is the viability of contrastive learning as the pretraining objective, ablated against and outperforming masked reconstruction pretraining.
